subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise befitteth the Self-Sufficient, the Most High, Who is exalted above all change and decline, for from the effulgent rays of light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از تغییر و زوال غنی متعال را لایق و سزاست که از تجلیات انوار نیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @station of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
